llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 13.1 (Annual Update to the Local Control Accountability Plan) was moved earlier in the agenda to be taken right after item 9.1 (Parcel Tax Discussion), positioned above the consent items.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll move to approve. Seconded. All those in favor? Aye.

items.intro_words: Welcome, everybody. We're going to go ahead and get started.
We can have a roll call, please. Trustee Marquez.
Report out on closed session from February 28, 2024.
See Necessita tradition en espanol, per favor.
Do we have any changes to the agenda?
Do we have a motion to approve the agenda?
We have a couple of items for oral communication.
So we can move on to 9.1. So is Ms. Kumar on by any chance?
So we moved item 13.1 up. So that is next on the agenda.
So we usually take a break at 9 o'clock, so I want to check in.
We're on consent. I'll move to approve.
11.1 the 2024 CSBA delegate delegate assembly nominations.
Reports from board members and superintendent who would like to go first
Items 13.2 through 13.7 are the first interim report and the audited financial
Item 14.1 correspondence emails. Yeah, one one was a speaker here tonight.
15.1 Possible other business suggested items for the future agenda.
Changes to the board meeting calendar. I don't think nothing.
It is 9:36. If there's a motion to adjourn, make a motion to adjourn the meeting.
